title: Life Sap damages equipped opponent creature on opponent draw

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Equip this card to your opponent's creature. Whenever your opponent draws a card, inflict 5 damage to the equipped creature and heal your creature 5 HP.

plan.title: Life Sap damages equipped opponent creature on opponent draw
plan.summary: Equip Life Sap to the opponent creature, trigger the opponent draw, and verify the equipped creature takes 5 damage.

notes: Pre-place Life Sap as field magic equipped to player_2 primary creature.
When player_2 draws a card, Life Sap inflicts 5 damage to the equipped creature.

steps: Equip Life Sap to player_2 primary creature.
manualVerification: Life Sap should damage the equipped opponent creature, not the controller creature.
riskNotes: Opponent-target equip and draw-trigger routing are both part of this check.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_018_life_sap-018-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
